'''Nomad squad''' was a unit of ten veteran [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] serving at the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] on [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the [[Battle of Taul]], Nomad squad was under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Krendan]]. Among the squad were a [[grenade launcher]] [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] and a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] specialist. The rest of the squad were armed with [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blasters]] and [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]].
